title: TerraFirmaSquid(TFS)
description: This is an UNNOFFICIAL TerraFirmaCraft(TFC) Modpack I made for fun.
body:
🌊 TerraFirmaSquid

A survival-centric [TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) modpack with lightweight quality-of-life tweaks and immersive enhancements.
🧱 What is TerraFirmaSquid?

TerraFirmaSquid is a curated modpack built around TerraFirmaCraft (TFC) for Minecraft 1.20.1, aiming to enrich the harsh, rewarding survival gameplay of TFC while adding carefully selected improvements and integrations. It retains the soul of TerraFirmaCraft — realistic geology, metallurgy, and survival mechanics — and adds features to make the experience smoother, more immersive, and more replayable.

This pack is designed for players who enjoy TFC's depth but want:

    Better visuals, usability, and performance

    Integration with modern mod conveniences

    More exploration, world interactivity, and long-term goals

⚙️ Features

    ✅ Built on TerraFirmaCraft (official 1.20.1 version)

    🧭 Exploration enhancements: Improved worldgen variety, points of interest, and loot rebalancing

    🛠️ QoL improvements: Recipe tweaks, smarter UI, hotkey helpers, and compatibility enhancements

    🌍 Immersive add-ons: Visual and audio mods chosen to maintain the realistic aesthetic

    🔧 Performance optimizations: Lightweight setup with performance mods like FerriteCore and Oculus

💡 Why Play TerraFirmaSquid?

    You're tired of vanilla and want a real survival challenge without adding grind for grind's sake

    You enjoy crafting stories in a harsh but beautiful world

    You want to experience TFC in modern Minecraft with modern features

    You appreciate modpacks that respect the original vision of the base mod while thoughtfully extending it

🧪 Modpack Philosophy

    🐙 Squid-smart: Every mod is included with a purpose — no bloat, no fluff

    🔁 Replayable: Designed to encourage long-term worlds with dynamic systems

    🧵 Cozy-compatible: Includes support for both solo and small-server multiplayer

    🔄 Actively maintained: Tweaks and balance updates based on feedback and testing

📦 Included Highlights (Besides TerraFirmaCraft)

    Animal Respawn System (Custom Addon)

    JEI + TFC Integration

    Dynamic Trees + Realistic Foliage

    Improved Weather and Ambient Sounds

    Map mods for realistic exploration (optional)

    Performance mods (Rubidium, Oculus, etc.)


Note: THIS IS A BETA! + There is a resource pack glitch that I dont know how to get rid of.
